name: Notice of Contract Termination
description: Formal notice informing the other party that the contract is terminated for just cause due to non-compliance.
content:
Date: {{formatDate current_date}}

FROM:
{{sender_name_title}}
{{sender_address}}

TO:
{{recipient_name_title}}
{{recipient_address}}

RE: Notice of Termination of Contract dated {{formatDate contract_date}} regarding {{contract_subject}}

Dear Sir/Madam,

This letter serves as formal written notice that we are terminating the aforementioned contract, effective immediately, due to your failure to fulfill the obligations set forth in the agreement.

Specifically, the termination is based on the following breach(es) of contract:

{{breach_reasons}}

Despite previous communications attempting to resolve these issues, the breaches have not been cured. Therefore, we are exercising our right to terminate the contract in accordance with Clause {{clause_no}} of the agreement.

{{#if compensation_amount}}

Furthermore, due to the damages incurred as a result of these breaches, we demand payment of {{compensation_amount}} as compensation/penalty within {{payment_days}} days of receipt of this notice. Failure to remit this payment may result in legal action to recover the amounts owed, along with associated legal fees.

{{/if}}

Please ensure that any outstanding matters or handovers are completed promptly. All our rights and remedies under the contract and applicable laws are strictly reserved.

Sincerely,

{{sender_name_title}}


Signature: ____________________

fields.name: breach_reasons
fields.label: Reasons for Termination (Breaches)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Failure to deliver the project on time, failure to make payments, etc.
